title: Add magic link send form to /login
description: Add the magic link section to login.html — a toggle button that reveals an email field to send a sign-in link.
acceptance_criteria: Divider 'or' separates the password form and magic link section
Button 'Sign in without a password' toggles a magic link email form
Magic link form has an email input and 'Send link' button

steps.description: Add magic link HTML (same pattern as /signup)
steps.details: Duplicate the structure from TASK-012 but change button label to 'Sign in without a password' and use id='send-magic-link-login' for the send button.
